title: gymnogramma rutifolia var. hispanica
intro: Gymnogramma rutifolia var. hispanica, also known as the Spanish fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Gymnogramma genus and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma rutifolia var. hispanica are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
